meta.expr:content: data:view.label + " kategorisindeki tüm forum konuları ve tartışmalar."
meta.name: description

meta.expr:content: data:view.search.query + " için forum içi arama sonuçları."
meta.name: description

head.b:skin: :root{--vbulletin-darkblue:#182332;--vbulletin-headerbg:#223143;--forum-blue-stripe:#2b70c9;--forum-bg-light:#f4f6f9;--forum-row-hover:#f8fafc;--text-color:#334155;--text-meta:#5b6b7f;--vbulletin-alt1:#fff;--vbulletin-alt2:#f8fafc;--vbulletin-border:#e2e8f0;--vbulletin-link:#1f5fb8;--pulse-color:#ef4444}*{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}body{font-family:Arial,Tahoma,Calibri,Verdana,sans-serif;font-size:13px;background:var(--forum-bg-light);color:var(--text-color);padding:0 0 16px;line-height:1.5}a{color:var(--vbulletin-link);text-decoration:none}a:hover{text-decoration:underline;color:var(--vbulletin-darkblue)}button{font:inherit}.page-wrapper{max-width:1240px;margin:0 auto;padding:16px}.hamdi-header-wrapper{background:var(--vbulletin-darkblue);width:100%;border-bottom:3px solid var(--forum-blue-stripe)}.hamdi-header-container{max-width:1240px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 16px;height:65px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between}.hamdi-logo-area a{font-size:24px;font-weight:800;color:#fff!important;letter-spacing:-.5px}.hamdi-logo-area a span{color:var(--forum-blue-stripe)}.hamdi-main-nav{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px}.hamdi-nav-item{color:#e2e8f0;font-size:13px;font-weight:600;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:4px;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:background .2s,color .2s;background:transparent;border:0;cursor:pointer}.hamdi-nav-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);color:#fff!important;text-decoration:none}.hamdi-nav-item.nav-register{background:var(--forum-blue-stripe);color:#fff!important}.hamdi-nav-item.nav-register:hover{background:#1d5db3}.hamdi-sub-navbar{background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.03);margin-bottom:20px}.hamdi-sub-container{max-width:1240px;margin:0 auto;padding:10px 16px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px}.hamdi-sub-links{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:15px}.hamdi-sub-links a{color:#475569;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}.hamdi-sub-links a:hover{color:var(--forum-blue-stripe);text-decoration:none}.hamdi-search-form{display:flex;align-items:center}.hamdi-search-input{padding:6px 12px;font-size:12px;border:1px solid #cbd5e1;border-radius:4px 0 0 4px;outline:0;width:180px;height:32px}.hamdi-search-btn{height:32px;padding:0 12px;background:var(--forum-blue-stripe);color:#fff;border:0;border-radius:0 4px 4px 0;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:700}.forum-block{display:flex;flex-direction:column;border:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);background:#fff;margin-bottom:20px;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.02)}.forum-header{background:var(--vbulletin-headerbg);color:#fff;font-weight:700;padding:12px 16px;font-size:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--forum-blue-stripe)}.hamdi-forum-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:46px 1fr 100px 30px;align-items:center;padding:12px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);background:#fff;transition:background .15s ease;position:relative}.hamdi-forum-row:hover{background:var(--forum-row-hover)}.hamdi-forum-row:last-child{border-bottom:0}.hamdi-title a::after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:1}.hamdi-avatar-holder{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:#f1f5f9;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);position:relative;z-index:2}.hamdi-status-dot{width:10px;height:10px;background:var(--forum-blue-stripe);border-radius:50%;position:absolute;bottom:-1px;right:-1px;border:2px solid #fff}.hamdi-main-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:3px;padding-left:4px;overflow:hidden}.hamdi-title{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#1e293b;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:100%}.hamdi-title a{color:#1e293b;position:relative;z-index:2}.hamdi-title a:hover{color:var(--forum-blue-stripe)}.hamdi-meta{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-meta)}.hamdi-author{color:#475569;font-weight:500}.hamdi-replies-zone{text-align:right;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-meta);padding-right:10px;font-weight:600}.hamdi-arrow-zone{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;color:#94a3b8}.forum-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:54px 1fr;border-bottom:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);background:#fff}.forum-row:last-child{border-bottom:0}.alt-row-1{background:var(--vbulletin-alt1);padding:14px 16px;width:100%;min-width:0}.category-icon-wrapper{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:var(--vbulletin-alt2);border-right:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);color:var(--forum-blue-stripe);width:54px;height:100%;min-height:68px}.cat-last-post-box{margin-top:5px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-meta)}.cat-last-title{font-weight:600;color:var(--vbulletin-link)}.cat-last-meta{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-meta);margin-top:1px}.stat-online-card{background:var(--vbulletin-headerbg);color:#fff;padding:14px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);border-left:4px solid var(--forum-blue-stripe)}.stat-online-card-left{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}.stat-online-card-icon{width:40px;height:40px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;color:#fff}.stat-online-card-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px}.stat-online-title{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.85);font-weight:500}.stat-online-count{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:-.3px}.stat-online-btn{background:var(--forum-blue-stripe);color:#fff!important;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid transparent;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;transition:background .2s;cursor:pointer}.stat-online-btn:hover{background:var(--vbulletin-darkblue);text-decoration:none;border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.1)}.hamdi-stat-block{border:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);background:#fff;margin-bottom:20px;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column}.stat-line-truncate{display:block;width:100%;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;min-width:0}.stat-line-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;width:100%;overflow:hidden;min-width:0}.stat-grid-row{display:flex;flex-direction:row;width:100%}.stat-grid-cell{padding:14px 10px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border-bottom:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);border-right:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);width:33.33%}.stat-grid-cell:last-child{border-right:0}.stat-small-icon-bg{width:36px;height:36px;background:#f1f5f9;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--vbulletin-link);flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);margin-bottom:5px}.stat-cell-info{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;gap:1px}.stat-cell-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--text-meta);font-weight:500}.stat-cell-value{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#1e293b}.footer-link-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);width:100%;margin-top:15px}.footer-link-grid div{padding:12px;border:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);text-align:center;font-weight:500}.footer-link-grid div a{color:var(--text-color)}.footer-link-grid div a:hover{color:var(--vbulletin-link)}.footer-link-grid div:nth-child(even){border-left:none}.footer-link-grid div:nth-child(n+3){border-top:0}.postbit-container{border:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);background:#fff;margin-bottom:20px;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:100%}.postbit-head{background:var(--vbulletin-headerbg);color:#fff;padding:12px 16px;font-weight:700;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;font-size:13px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--forum-blue-stripe)}.postbit-body{display:flex;flex-direction:column;width:100%}.postbit-sidebar{width:100%;background:var(--vbulletin-alt2);border-bottom:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);padding:12px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap}.postbit-user-info{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}.postbit-avatar-wrapper{width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:50%;background:#f1f5f9;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);position:relative;color:#64748b}.postbit-online-dot{width:9px;height:9px;background:var(--forum-blue-stripe);border-radius:50%;position:absolute;bottom:-1px;right:-1px;border:1.5px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 0 2px rgba(0,0,0,.2)}.postbit-username{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:var(--vbulletin-link)}.postbit-user-stats{display:flex;gap:15px;font-size:12px;color:var(--text-meta);align-items:center}.postbit-stat-item{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}.postbit-main{width:100%;background:var(--vbulletin-alt1);padding:20px 16px}.postbit-content{font-size:14px;line-height:1.7;min-height:100px;color:var(--text-color);width:100%}.postbit-content img,.postbit-content iframe{width:100%;display:block;margin:15px auto;aspect-ratio:16/9;max-width:700px}.postbit-content img{height:auto}.postbit-foot{background:var(--vbulletin-alt2);border-top:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);padding:12px 16px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:12px;align-items:center}.postbit-share-zone{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px}.postbit-share-link{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-weight:500;color:#475569}.postbit-share-link:hover{color:var(--vbulletin-link);text-decoration:none}.postbit-reply-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-weight:700;color:var(--forum-blue-stripe)!important;cursor:pointer;background:transparent;border:0}.postbit-reply-btn:hover{text-decoration:underline;color:var(--vbulletin-link)!important}.comment-form-holder-box{display:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s ease-in-out;padding:15px;background:var(--vbulletin-alt2);border-top:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border)}.comment-form-holder-box.form-active{display:block!important;opacity:1!important}.vb-pagination{display:flex;justify-content:center;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:15px;background:#fff;border-top:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border)}.vb-page-btn{padding:6px 14px;background:var(--vbulletin-alt2);border:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-color);transition:background .15s,color .15s}.vb-page-btn:hover:not(:disabled){background:var(--forum-blue-stripe);color:#fff;border-color:var(--forum-blue-stripe)}.vb-page-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed}.vb-page-info{font-size:12px;color:var(--text-meta);font-weight:500}.animate-spin{animation:spin 1s linear infinite}@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}.main-content-layout{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:20px;width:100%}.main-column{width:100%}.vb-notif{position:fixed;top:14px;right:16px;z-index:100000}.vb-notif-bell{width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--vbulletin-darkblue);border:2px solid var(--forum-blue-stripe);color:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.25);position:relative;padding:0}.vb-notif-bell:hover{background:var(--vbulletin-headerbg)}.vb-notif-dot{position:absolute;top:-4px;right:-4px;min-width:18px;height:18px;padding:0 4px;background:var(--pulse-color);color:#fff;border-radius:9px;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:2px solid #fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(239,68,68,.7);animation:pulse-anim 1.2s infinite}.vb-notif.has-unread .vb-notif-dot{display:flex}.vb-notif-panel{position:absolute;top:52px;right:0;width:320px;max-width:86vw;max-height:70vh;overflow-y:auto;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.18);display:none}.vb-notif.open .vb-notif-panel{display:block}.vb-notif-head{background:var(--vbulletin-headerbg);color:#fff;font-weight:700;padding:10px 14px;font-size:13px;border-bottom:2px solid var(--forum-blue-stripe);position:sticky;top:0}.vb-notif-item{display:block;padding:10px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border);font-size:12px;color:var(--text-color)}.vb-notif-item:last-child{border-bottom:0}.vb-notif-item:hover{background:var(--forum-row-hover);text-decoration:none}.vb-notif-kind{display:inline-block;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#fff;background:var(--forum-blue-stripe);border-radius:3px;padding:1px 6px;margin-bottom:4px}.vb-notif-kind.reply{background:var(--pulse-color)}.vb-notif-title{font-weight:600;color:var(--vbulletin-link);display:block}.vb-notif-sub{color:var(--text-meta);margin-top:2px}.vb-notif-empty{padding:18px 14px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-meta);font-size:12px}.forum-notify-box{position:fixed;bottom:20px;right:20px;background:#fff;border-left:4px solid var(--pulse-color);box-shadow:0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,.15);padding:12px 18px;border-radius:4px;z-index:99999;display:none;align-items:center;gap:12px;animation:slideInUp .4s ease-out}.notify-pulse-dot{width:10px;height:10px;background:var(--pulse-color);border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(239,68,68,.7);animation:pulse-anim 1.2s infinite}@keyframes slideInUp{from{transform:translateY(100%);opacity:0}to{transform:translateY(0);opacity:1}}@keyframes pulse-anim{0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(239,68,68,.7)}70%{box-shadow:0 0 0 10px rgba(239,68,68,0)}100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(239,68,68,0)}}.widget.ContactForm{position:absolute!important;left:-99999px!important;width:1px!important;height:1px!important;overflow:hidden!important;opacity:0!important}#mifrm-overlay{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);backdrop-filter:blur(5px);z-index:99999;justify-content:center;align-items:center}#mifrm-panel{width:90%;max-width:600px;background:#fff;padding:20px;border-radius:8px;position:relative;box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,.3)}#mifrm-panel .mifrm-close{position:absolute;top:10px;right:14px;font-size:22px;line-height:1;cursor:pointer;color:#64748b;background:transparent;border:0}.btn-action{width:100%;padding:12px;border:0;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;color:#fff;margin-bottom:10px;font-weight:bold}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){*{animation:none!important;transition:none!important}}@media(max-width:768px){.hamdi-header-container{height:auto;flex-direction:column;padding:12px;gap:12px}.hamdi-main-nav{flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center}.hamdi-sub-container{flex-direction:column;text-align:center}.hamdi-sub-links{justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}.footer-link-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}.footer-link-grid div{border-left:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border)!important;border-top:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border)!important}.footer-link-grid div:first-child{border-top:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border)!important}.postbit-sidebar{flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px}.postbit-user-stats{width:100%;justify-content:flex-start;gap:14px}.stat-cell-value{font-size:12px}.stat-cell-label{font-size:10px}.hamdi-forum-row{grid-template-columns:42px 1fr 60px;padding:10px}.hamdi-replies-zone{font-size:11px;padding-right:4px}.hamdi-arrow-zone{display:none}.vb-notif{top:10px;right:10px}.vb-notif-bell{width:38px;height:38px}}

div.div: Foruma az önce yeni bir girdi sağlandı.

button.style: background:none; border:none; color:#cbd5e1; font-size:16px; cursor:pointer; font-weight:bold; margin-left:10px;

input.style: width:100%; padding:10px; margin-bottom:10px; border:1px solid #ccc; box-sizing:border-box;

select.style: width:100%; padding:10px; margin-bottom:10px; border:1px solid #ccc; background:#fff;

div.style: width:100%; height:200px; padding:10px; border:1px solid #ccc; overflow-y:scroll; background:#fdfdfd; margin-bottom:10px;

nav.script: (function(){const BLOG_ID="2141149813172676021";const CLIENT_ID="963800962880-tk70ohacatac4vou6e4fvu163ip1tlro.apps.googleusercontent.com";const el={login:document.getElementById('loginBtn'),logout:document.getElementById('logoutBtn'),cat:document.getElementById('category'),title:document.getElementById('title'),editor:document.getElementById('editor'),status:document.getElementById('status'),pub:document.getElementById('publishBtn')};el.cat.innerHTML='<option value="">Kategori Seçin</option>';el.pub.onclick=async()=>{const token=localStorage.getItem("token");if(!token)return alert("Önce Giriş Yapın!");el.status.textContent="Yayınlanıyor...";try{const res=await fetch("https://www.googleapis.com/blogger/v3/blogs/"+BLOG_ID+"/posts/",{method:"POST",headers:{"Authorization":"Bearer "+token,"Content-Type":"application/json"},body:JSON.stringify({title:el.title.value,content:el.editor.innerHTML,labels:[el.cat.value]})});const data=await res.json();if(data.id){alert("Başarılı!");document.getElementById("mifrm-overlay").style.display="none";}else{el.status.textContent="Hata oluştu.";}}catch(e){el.status.textContent="Bağlantı hatası.";}};el.login.onclick=()=>google.accounts.oauth2.initTokenClient({client_id:CLIENT_ID,scope:"https://www.googleapis.com/auth/blogger",callback:(res)=>{localStorage.setItem("token",res.access_token);location.reload();}}).requestAccessToken();el.logout.onclick=()=>{localStorage.removeItem("token");location.reload();};if(localStorage.getItem("token")){el.login.style.display="none";el.logout.style.display="block";}})();

div.style: padding:25px; text-align:center; color:#64748b; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px;
padding:12px 16px; font-size:12px; border-top:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border); line-height:1.8; overflow:hidden;
border:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border); margin-bottom:12px; border-radius:4px; overflow:hidden;
background:var(--vbulletin-headerbg); color:#ffffff; padding:6px 12px; font-weight:bold; font-size:11px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between;

b:with.value: "window.prompt(\"Copy to clipboard: Ctrl+C, Enter\", \"" + data:originalUrl + "\"); return false;"

b:include.data: { sharingId: data:sharingId, originalUrl: data:post.url, platforms: data:this.sharing.platforms, shareUrl: data:post.shareUrl, shareTitle: data:post.title, }
b:include.name: sharingButtons

footer.style: margin-top:20px; padding:16px; border:1px solid var(--vbulletin-border); border-radius:6px; background:#ffffff;

div.div: Powered by Blogger & Modern Forum Engine
